Add Mailing List Member.description: Adds a new member to a mailing list.

Bulk Email Validation.description: Upload a CSV and start a bulk validation job using Mailgun V4 API.

Get Bulk Validation Results.description: Retrieves completed bulk validation job results.

Send Email.description: Sends an email using your Mailgun account.

Validate Email.description: Validates an email address and returns deliverability results.
